Capabilities

Full-service precision manufacturing, from print to finished part.

01 / MOLD & TOOLING

Injection Mold Tooling

Mirror-finish cavity and core machining for multi-cavity production molds, built for high-volume repeatability.

02 / CNC MACHINING

Precision CNC Turning & Milling

Tight-tolerance shafts, pins, and fasteners machined and ground to spec, verified on every run.

03 / ENGINEERING

Design & DFM Support

Section drawings, GD&T review, and design-for-manufacture guidance before a single chip is cut.

04 / FABRICATION

Sheet Metal & Enclosures

Formed and welded brackets, housings, and enclosures finished to industrial or cosmetic-grade spec.

05 / FINISHING

Surface Finishing

Anodizing, polishing, and coating services matched to the part's functional and appearance requirements.

06 / QUALITY

Inspection & QA

CMM-verified dimensional reporting on every production lot, with full first-article documentation.

From Print to Part

Our production sequence, in order — the same four stages every job moves through.

STAGE 01

Design Review

Prints, tolerances, and GD&T are reviewed for manufacturability before quoting.

STAGE 02

Tooling

Mold cavities and fixtures are cut and mirror-polished to production spec.

STAGE 03

Machining

Components are turned, milled, and ground to the drawing's exact tolerance.

STAGE 04

Inspection

Every lot is CMM-verified and documented before it ships.
